nodes.label: DOM Capture Engine
nodes.rationale: Recursively walks DOM tree using getBoundingClientRect and getComputedStyle to capture position, size, and visual styles into structured JSON. Depth limited to 10 to prevent excessive recursion. Capture-phase event listeners intercept user clicks before page handlers.

nodes.label: Prompt Builder
nodes.rationale: Converts captured DOM JSON into a structured, copy-ready prompt using pure JavaScript template logic. No AI API required for v1.0 to ensure offline capability, zero backend dependency, and deterministic fast output.

nodes.label: Zero Backend Architecture
nodes.rationale: Extension operates entirely client-side using chrome.storage.local. No external servers, no API keys needed in v1.0. Faster to ship, fully private, works offline.

nodes.label: Local Storage Only
nodes.rationale: Captured DOM data is stored temporarily in chrome.storage.local. It never leaves the device, is overwritten on each new capture, and is deleted when the extension is uninstalled.

nodes.label: Manifest V3
nodes.rationale: Required by Chrome for all new extensions. Uses a service worker (background.js) instead of a persistent background page. CSP compliant with no inline event handlers.

nodes.label: Vibe Coding Prompt Generation
nodes.rationale: Output formats include HTML/CSS (precise, no frameworks), React + Tailwind (arbitrary values), and v0/Bolt/Lovable (natural language, descriptive). Designed for AI builder tools.

nodes.label: Complete Color Parser
nodes.rationale: Original parseColor only handled rgb/rgba. Fixed version adds hex parsing (3 and 6 digit), CSS keyword lookup (transparent, white, black, red, green, blue), input type guards, and safe fallback to null for unhandled values like currentColor and inherit.

nodes.label: Input Validation in buildPrompt
nodes.rationale: Added object-type and array checks for capturedJSON, a whitelisted VALID_FORMATS array, and a top-level try-catch to prevent silent crashes and return meaningful error messages.

nodes.label: DOM Element Null Checks
nodes.rationale: Replaced bare document.getElementById calls with a getRequiredElement helper that throws descriptive errors if any required popup DOM element is missing, preventing silent initialization failures.

nodes.label: Message Error Handling
nodes.rationale: Replaced Promise.catch(()=>{}) with callback-style sendMessage that checks chrome.runtime.lastError. Prevents unhandled rejections when popup is not open and surfaces debug info.

nodes.label: Tab Switch Race Condition Fix
nodes.rationale: Added early returns for null activeTabId and same-tab switches. Stores oldTabId before nulling state so sendMessage failure on a dead tab is handled gracefully with debug logging.

nodes.label: Event Listener Cleanup
nodes.rationale: Added captureMode guard to activate() and deactivate() to prevent duplicate listener registration on SPAs. All four capture-phase listeners are explicitly removed on deactivation to avoid memory leaks.

nodes.label: Background Color Resolution
nodes.rationale: Added maxDepth guard (20), ELEMENT_NODE check, and fallback to document.documentElement background before hardcoded white. Prevents infinite recursion and respects actual page background.

nodes.label: Better Text Truncation
nodes.rationale: Replaced hardcoded slice(0,200) with a truncateText helper that finds the last space before the limit and appends an ellipsis, preventing mid-word cuts and garbled prompt output.

nodes.label: SVG Error Handling
nodes.rationale: Wrapped SVG outerHTML access in a try-catch with type and length validation. Truncates oversized SVGs to 5000 chars with an inline comment, preventing crashes on malformed or huge inline SVGs.

nodes.label: Format Validation
nodes.rationale: Added a VALID_FORMATS whitelist and explicit check against btn.dataset.format before updating state. Prevents XSS-like injection via manipulated data attributes and skips redundant re-renders.

nodes.label: Design Tokens Extraction
nodes.rationale: Colors, fonts, spacing, radii, and shadows are deduplicated into a token table within the generated prompt to give AI builders a consolidated reference and maintain consistency.
